steps.title: Introduce the contrast cleanly
steps.content: The sentence first says OHD requires calibration based on context and composition. The word though then introduces a qualification: several other factors affect rind growth. The following clause explains that qualification by listing temperature, water vapor pressure, and glass chemistry.

steps.title: Use comma plus colon
steps.content: Choice B lacks needed punctuation, Choice C misuses a semicolon before though, and Choice D treats though as a parenthetical before a full clause. The remaining choice sets up the contrast and introduces the factor list. The answer is A.
